picks.quote: I think Diego Lopes will have the grappling advantage... there's a clear path for Diego Lopes to take Steve Garcia down.
I could see him coming out here with a wrestling heavy game plan. It would be smart... I could see a path for Chandler to come out here and grapple a bit
Josh Barnett should be able to dominate this fight... I like Josh Barnett and I got a same game parlay here.
I still like Sean O'Malley quite a bit this week. He should be able to get the job done.
I think Alex Pereira has the power upside... I like the upside for Pereira. So, for -165, took a tiny little core units tab on that
I think Ilia Topuria would still handily win a decision... I think Topuria has the skill sets to probably get it done extremely early.
I also got Josh Emmett money line parlayed up with Sean O'Malley
